MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Camillo J. Borruso, James P. Borruso and Dennis J. Borruso are present.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiffs.
Defendant Dmitrujs Pjatkius is present.
Attorney Misti M. Schmidt representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-7-2011 is vacated.
